common.tagline: The Global Marketplace for AI Training Talent
common.heroSub: Hire. Test. Trust. Train. Connect with elite AI trainers tested on your actual model.

trainersList.title: AI Trainers & Experts — Verified on Your Model
trainersList.description: Browse the Trainova AI directory of fine-tuning, RLHF, prompt engineering, evaluation, safety and data-labeling specialists. Every verified trainer has been tested on a live company model.

requestsList.title: Open AI Training Requests
requestsList.description: Live requests from global companies hiring AI trainers. Fine-tuning, prompt engineering, RLHF, evaluation, data labeling and more — apply directly on Trainova AI.

skillsList.title: AI Skills Directory
skillsList.description: Explore every AI training specialty on Trainova AI — from LLM fine-tuning to safety alignment — with expert counts, trainers and live requests per skill.

pricing.title: Pricing for Companies and Trainers
pricing.description: Simple, transparent pricing for AI training teams. Free to start, Pro for growth, Enterprise for large model programs.

about.title: About Trainova AI
about.description: Trainova AI is the global marketplace, evaluation system and collaboration workspace for AI training talent — built for companies that need verified specialists on their actual models.

trainer.descriptionTemplate: {name} is an AI trainer on Trainova AI specialising in {skills}. {country}

company.descriptionTemplate: {name} is a verified company on Trainova AI, hiring AI trainers for model training, evaluation and data projects.

request.descriptionFallback: Open AI training request on Trainova AI.

skill.titleTemplate: {name} — AI Trainers, Experts and Open Requests
skill.descriptionTemplate: Find {name} specialists on Trainova AI. Browse verified trainers, review open requests and test candidates on your live model.

howItWorks.title: Cómo funciona Trainova AI
howItWorks.description: De publicar una solicitud a evaluar, contratar y pagar: descubre el flujo completo de Trainova AI para empresas y formadores.

forCompanies.title: Trainova AI para empresas
forCompanies.description: Contrata, evalúa y firma contratos con formadores IA verificados sobre tu modelo. Builder de solicitudes, motor de evaluación, pagos en escrow y analítica.

forTrainers.title: Trainova AI para formadores
forTrainers.description: Consigue contratos IA globales, demuestra tu habilidad sobre modelos reales y cobra mediante escrow seguro.

blog.title: Blog de Trainova AI
blog.description: Artículos, tutoriales e informes de campo sobre fine-tuning, RLHF, prompt engineering, evaluación y alineación de seguridad.

faq.title: Preguntas frecuentes
faq.description: Respuestas sobre Trainova AI: precios, evaluación, pagos, verificación, disputas y cómo funciona la plataforma.

contact.title: Contacta con Trainova AI
contact.description: Habla con nuestros equipos de soporte, ventas, prensa o alianzas. Respondemos en un día hábil.

advertise.title: Anuncia en Trainova AI
advertise.description: Llega a equipos de IA, responsables de MLOps y especialistas verificados con destacados, resultados patrocinados y patrocinio de categoría.

landing.heroTitle: Hire, test and train the world's best AI specialists.
landing.heroBody: Post a request, link your model or sandbox, and Trainova AI matches you with verified experts — screened on the exact problem you need solved.

pillars.marketplaceBody: Discover verified specialists in fine-tuning, RLHF, prompt engineering, safety alignment and more.
pillars.evalBody: Test candidates on your actual model, sandbox or API. Automated + human scoring with full audit trails.
pillars.workspaceBody: Chat, negotiate, contract, pay and review — all inside one secure, audit-ready platform.

auth.forgotPasswordLead: Enter your account email. If it matches an active account we’ll send a reset link.
auth.forgotPasswordSent: If the email exists, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox (and spam).
auth.resetPasswordLead: Pick a strong password (8+ characters). This link can only be used once.
auth.resetPasswordDone: Password updated. You can sign in now.
auth.resetPasswordInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
auth.verifyEmailInvalid: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from your account.

formBuilder.title: Application form
formBuilder.description: Add custom questions trainers must answer when applying. Optional.
formBuilder.empty: No custom questions yet. Use the buttons below to add fields.

errors.missingLabels: Every custom field needs both English and Arabic labels.
errors.missingOptions: Choice fields need at least two options.

fields.title: Title
fields.modelConnectionHint: Shortlisted trainers will get live access to this model through the workbench.

attachments.title: Archivos adjuntos
attachments.help: Adjunta un CV, una muestra de escritura o un portafolio para que la empresa pueda evaluar tu perfil junto con la carta de presentación.
attachments.emptyTrainer: Aún no hay archivos adjuntos. Sube archivos abajo — hasta 5 × 10MB (PDF, ZIP, DOCX, PNG, JPG).
attachments.emptyCompany: El candidato no ha adjuntado ningún archivo de soporte.

dropzone.label: Drop files to attach
dropzone.help: CV (PDF), writing samples, portfolio ZIP or screenshots.

trainer.title: My profile
trainer.subtitle: This is what companies see when they browse trainers. Fill it out to get matched.

fields.headline: Headline
fields.headlineHelp: One-line summary, e.g. "Senior RLHF annotator for Arabic LLMs".
fields.bioHelp: Markdown-safe text. Describe your experience, domains, model families, and what you want to work on.
fields.languagesHelp: Press Enter to add each language.

skills.noneSelected: No skills selected yet. Pick at least 3 so companies can match you.

completeness.title: Profile completeness
completeness.lead: {pct}% complete — profiles at 80%+ get matched 3× more often.

trainer.rateOrderError: Hourly rate min must be ≤ max.

company.title: Company profile
company.subtitle: Public information shown on your company page and on every request you post.

fields.name: Company name
fields.descriptionHelp: Short public description — mission, domain, what you use AI for.
fields.logoHelp: Shown on your company page and on every request you post.

uploads.dropLogo: Drag a logo here, or click to choose a file
uploads.replaceLogo: Drag a new logo, or click to replace
uploads.dropAvatar: Drag a photo here, or click to choose
uploads.replaceAvatar: Drag a new photo, or click to replace
uploads.dropPortfolio: Drag images or PDFs here, or click to choose
uploads.avatarHelp: PNG, JPEG, or WebP up to 512 KB. Shown on your public profile.
uploads.portfolioHelp: Images and PDF case studies — up to 10 items, 5 MB each.
uploads.portfolioFormats: PNG, JPEG, WebP, or PDF · 5 MB max per file.

errors.clientValidation: That file can't be uploaded. Max {maxKb} KB and types: {types}.
errors.rateLimit: Too many uploads. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.tooLarge: File is larger than the allowed size.
errors.presignFailed: Couldn't start the upload. Please try again.
errors.uploadFailed: Upload failed partway through. Please try again.
errors.commitFailed: Upload finished but couldn't be saved. Please try again.

models.title: Registro de modelos
models.subtitle: Bind your live AI models — OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic, Bedrock, HuggingFace or any HTTPS endpoint — so trainers can evaluate them inside Trainova without ever seeing your credentials. Keys are encrypted at rest and rotated through the platform proxy.
models.testingLive: Probing the provider — this can take up to 8 seconds.
models.helper: Connections start as draft and auto-promote to active on the first successful test.
models.confirmDelete: Soft-delete this connection? Trainers using it will lose access immediately.

empty.title: No models connected yet
empty.body: Add your first connection to enable in-platform evaluation. We never store credentials in plaintext.

fields.name: Display name
fields.credentialsHint: Pasted once, encrypted at rest. We display only the first/last 4 characters afterwards.
fields.credentialsUpdateHint: Leave blank to keep the existing key (current preview: {preview}).

editor.subtitle: We probe the live endpoint after save and only mark it Active when it responds.

applications.title: Solicitudes recibidas
applications.terminal: This application has reached a final state.

confirm.revert: Move this application back to applied?

note.label: Note to the internal audit trail (optional, max 500 chars)
note.placeholder: e.g. Strong portfolio, invite to an intro interview.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.hasAttempts: This test already has attempts and can't be deleted.
errors.titleRequired: Title must be at least 3 characters.
errors.mcqNeedsOptions: Task {n}: MCQ needs at least 2 options.
errors.mcqNeedsAnswer: Task {n}: pick one option as the correct answer.

fields.title: Title
fields.passingScoreHint: Hint for reviewers — the decision is still manual.

tasks.heading: Tasks
tasks.empty: No tasks yet — add one using the buttons above.
tasks.rubricHint: Grading hint for reviewers (hidden from trainer)
tasks.rubricPlaceholder: e.g. Look for correct framing, not just keywords.

assign.success: Test assigned. The trainer has been notified by email.

popover.title: Pick a test to assign
popover.empty: No tests authored yet — create one first.

grading.passingHintTooltip: Suggested by the test author; the decision is still yours.
grading.alreadyGraded: This attempt has already been graded.

dashboardRow.testAssigned: A test has been assigned — take it to move forward.
dashboardRow.graded: Test graded — open to see your result.

page.title: {testTitle}
page.passingHintTooltip: Guidance from the company — grading is still manual.

ready.title: Ready to start?
ready.body: You'll answer each task in order. You can only submit once.

noTest.title: No test is assigned yet
noTest.body: The company hasn't assigned a test to this application. Check back later.

take.confirmSubmit: Submit your attempt? You won't be able to change answers after this.
take.unanswered: {count, plural, one {# task is unanswered} other {# tasks are unanswered}} — submit anyway?

errors.generic: We couldn't submit your attempt. Please try again.
errors.alreadySubmitted: This attempt has already been submitted.

result.title: Attempt submitted
result.passed: Above the company's passing hint of {score}/100.
result.missed: Below the company's passing hint of {score}/100.

workbench.subtitle: Interact live with the company's model — every call is logged for review.

empty.title: Workbench not available
empty.body: We couldn't load workbench context for this application.

dashboardRow.body: A live model is attached — open the workbench to run evaluation calls.

composer.title: Compose a call
composer.hint: Credentials never leave the server. Each call is persisted for the company's audit trail.

history.title: Recent calls
history.empty: You haven't run any calls yet.

reasons.noModel: The company hasn't attached a live model to this request yet.
reasons.disabled: The company has disabled this connection.
reasons.inactive: This connection hasn't been activated yet.
reasons.notShortlisted: Workbench access opens after the company shortlists your application.

billing.companySubtitle: Manage your workspace plan, billing details, and invoices.
billing.confirmHint: Your card is tokenised by Stripe. We never see full card numbers.
billing.notConfigured: This tier is not yet connected to Stripe — it will be available shortly.
billing.cancelledOk: Cancellation scheduled — access stays until the end of this period.
billing.noActiveCompany: You are on the free workspace tier.
billing.noActiveTrainer: You are on the free trainer tier.

coupon.label: Código de cupón

placeholders.title: e.g. RLHF fine-tuning for customer-support bot
placeholders.description: Scope, deliverables, constraints, and communication cadence.

contracts.fundConfirmHint: Funds are held by the platform until you explicitly release them.
contracts.fundedOk: Milestone funded. Funds are held in escrow.

errors.titleRequired: A contract title of at least 4 characters is required.

plans.deleteConfirm: Delete this plan? This cannot be undone.

emailTemplates.title: Email templates
emailTemplates.subtitle: Admin-edited copy overrides the built-in templates. If a row is missing or disabled, the platform falls back to the bundled template so every flow keeps sending.
emailTemplates.empty: No templates yet. Built-in copy is used until you override it here.
emailTemplates.confirmDelete: Delete this template? The built-in fallback will be used instead.
emailTemplates.unknownKey: Unknown template key: {key}. Remove the row or add the spec in shared package.

missing.title: Missing translations
missing.subtitle: These (key, locale) pairs have no override row. The platform will use the built-in template until you create one.

variables.title: Variables
variables.help: Use {{name}} inside subject or body. Fill sample values here to preview.

coupons.title: Cupones y promociones
coupons.subtitle: Crea códigos de descuento para financiación de hitos o suscripciones recurrentes. Los cupones de suscripción se replican en Stripe; los de hito los absorbe la plataforma.
coupons.newSubtitle: Código, tipo, audiencia y validez. Una vez creados, código/tipo/importe son inmutables.
coupons.empty: Aún no hay cupones. Crea uno para lanzar promociones.
coupons.disableConfirm: ¿Desactivar este cupón? Se conservan los canjes existentes; no se aceptarán nuevos.

field.codeHint: 3–40 caracteres: A–Z, 0–9, guion, guion bajo. No distingue mayúsculas.
field.descriptionPlaceholder: Nota interna visible solo en el panel de admin.
field.planIdsHint: Si se establece, el cupón solo se aplica a estos planes. Déjalo vacío para todos.
field.stripeCouponIdHint: Obligatorio para cupones de suscripción. Crea el cupón en Stripe primero.

sponsored.title: Colocaciones patrocinadas
sponsored.subtitle: Otorga impulsos a entrenadores y solicitudes, supervisa colocaciones pagas y ajusta los pesos.
sponsored.empty: Ninguna colocación coincide con los filtros actuales.
sponsored.confirmDelete: ¿Eliminar esta colocación? No se puede deshacer.

fields.idHint: ID interno (visible en la URL de la página admin).
fields.weightHint: Peso del impulso ({min}–{max}). Mayor = mejor posición.

emailMarketing.title: Marketing por correo
emailMarketing.subtitle: Campañas de marketing redactadas por el administrador y secuencias automáticas. Los envíos se procesan en segundo plano y se rastrean por destinatario.
emailMarketing.locked: Esta campaña está bloqueada. Las campañas en envío o enviadas ya no son editables.
emailMarketing.editable: Los borradores y campañas programadas son editables hasta que comience el envío.

campaigns.title: Campañas de correo
campaigns.subtitle: Difusiones puntuales a un segmento de usuarios. Programa o envía de inmediato.
campaigns.newSubtitle: Compón una difusión puntual. Puedes previsualizar el segmento antes de guardar.

drip.title: Secuencias automáticas
drip.subtitle: Pasos ordenados con retrasos que se disparan automáticamente al inscribir al usuario.
drip.newSubtitle: Define una secuencia de correos programados. Añade pasos tras crearla.

confirm.delete: ¿Eliminar esta secuencia con todos sus pasos e inscripciones?
confirm.cancelEnrollment: ¿Cancelar esta inscripción? El usuario no recibirá los pasos restantes.

steps.title: Pasos
steps.empty: Aún no hay pasos. Añade el primero abajo.
steps.confirmDelete: ¿Eliminar este paso? Los pasos restantes se reenumerarán.

drip.enrollmentsEmpty: No hay inscripciones en este estado.

segment.title: Segmento de audiencia
segment.subtitle: Filtra destinatarios. Los filtros vacíos apuntan a todos los usuarios activos verificados.

confirm.sendNow: ¿Enviar esta campaña inmediatamente a todos los destinatarios coincidentes?

ads.title: Publicidad
ads.subtitle: Promote your company and open roles across Trainova. Set a budget, pick placements, and Trainova only charges per real impression or click.
ads.disclosure: All sponsored placements carry a visible 'Sponsored' label and link only to https:// destinations after review.

empty.title: No campaigns yet
empty.body: Create your first campaign to reach trainers and companies actively searching Trainova.

detail.confirmDelete: Delete this campaign? Any remaining budget is forfeit.
detail.noCreatives: No creatives yet — add one before submitting for review.

campaign.name: Campaign name
campaign.frequencyCap: Frequency cap per visitor per day

topup.hint: Use your billing page to add a card first — the saved pm_… id goes here.
topup.success: Top up in progress. Your budget updates as soon as Stripe confirms.

errors.topupFailed: We couldn't start the top up.

hub.title: Mensajes
hub.subtitle: Hilos privados con las empresas y los formadores con los que trabajas.
hub.emptyBody: En cuanto una candidatura entre en la lista corta o sea aceptada, podrás escribir a la otra parte desde su página de detalle.

room.sendFailed: Fallo al enviar. Inténtalo de nuevo.
room.emptyHint: Este es el inicio de vuestra conversación. Los mensajes son privados entre los participantes.

templates.loadError: No se pudieron cargar las plantillas.
templates.saveError: No se pudo guardar la plantilla.
templates.deleteError: No se pudo eliminar la plantilla.

ai.title: Copiloto de IA
ai.summaryHint: Genera un resumen de un párrafo de esta conversación, con los puntos clave que debes recordar.
ai.tasksHint: Extrae todas las acciones acordadas, con el responsable y la fecha de entrega cuando se mencionen.
ai.errorGeneric: Algo salió mal. Inténtalo de nuevo.

interviews.title: Entrevistas
interviews.emptyCompany: No hay entrevistas programadas. Elige un horario para reunirte con el formador.
interviews.invalidDate: Elige una fecha y hora futuras.
interviews.errorGeneric: Algo salió mal. Inténtalo de nuevo.

trainer.title: Recommended for you
trainer.subtitle: Open job requests scored against your skills, languages, rate range, and history. We surface the strongest fits first.
trainer.empty: No open requests match your profile yet. Add more skills or expand your languages to see more results.

company.title: Suggested trainers
company.subtitle: Top trainer matches for {title} based on shared skills, languages, rate fit, trust signals, and platform history.
company.empty: No trainers match this request yet. Try broadening the required skills or languages.

admin.title: Trainer matches
admin.subtitle: {title} — {company}
admin.empty: No trainers match this request with the current filter.

preferences.title: Preferencias
preferences.subtitle: Elige cómo se muestran los montos, fechas y la interfaz en Trainova.
preferences.timezoneHint: Usa un identificador IANA como Europe/Madrid, Asia/Riyadh o America/Los_Angeles. Déjalo vacío para seguir tu navegador.
preferences.currencyHint: Los montos de pago siempre se mantienen en la moneda del contrato; esta configuración solo cambia la visualización.
preferences.errorGeneric: No se pudieron guardar las preferencias. Inténtalo de nuevo.
preferences.fxStaleWarning: Los tipos de cambio no están disponibles temporalmente; los montos se muestran en su moneda original.

assist.title: Suite de Asistente IA
assist.subtitle: Nueve herramientas con LLM para redactar, filtrar, resumir, optimizar y tarifar.
assist.emptyResult: Ejecute una herramienta para ver la salida IA aquí.

REQUEST_DRAFT.heading: Redactar una solicitud de proyecto
REQUEST_DRAFT.help: Pegue un brief y generaremos una publicación completa con habilidades, presupuesto y condiciones.

placeholders.brief: Buscamos un experto en fine-tuning para alinear nuestro LLM...

APPLICATION_SCREEN.heading: Filtrar una candidatura
APPLICATION_SCREEN.help: Indique el ID. Calcularemos adecuación, resumen, fortalezas y riesgos.

CHAT_SUMMARY.heading: Resumir una conversación
CHAT_SUMMARY.help: Indique el ID. Resumiremos puntos clave y detectaremos el idioma.

CHAT_TASKS.heading: Extraer tareas de una conversación
CHAT_TASKS.help: Listaremos acciones con pistas de responsable y plazo.

SEO_META.heading: Generar meta SEO
SEO_META.help: Genera título, descripción, slug y palabras clave optimizadas.

EMAIL_DRAFT.heading: Redactar un email
EMAIL_DRAFT.help: Elija audiencia e intención. Generaremos asunto, preheader y cuerpo.

PRICING_SUGGEST.heading: Sugerir precio para una solicitud
PRICING_SUGGEST.help: Comparamos con contratos similares y recomendamos mín./máx./punto.

TEST_GEN.heading: Generar tareas de evaluación
TEST_GEN.help: Diseñamos tareas prácticas alineadas con las habilidades requeridas.

PROFILE_OPT.heading: Optimizar un perfil de formador
PROFILE_OPT.help: Refinamos titular, biografía, habilidades y damos consejos accionables.

hero.title: Del brief al contrato pagado — en una sola plataforma
hero.body: Trainova AI une marketplace, motor de evaluación y espacio de colaboración para proyectos de formación IA.

marketplace.title: Encuentra especialistas verificados
marketplace.body: Filtra por habilidad, idioma, país, experiencia con modelos y valoración.

evaluation.title: Pruébalos en tu modelo
evaluation.body: Conecta tu API, sandbox o entorno y puntúa a los candidatos sobre el problema real.

workspace.title: Negocia, contrata, paga
workspace.body: Chat, archivos, tareas, firma, escrow y reseñas — todo auditable.

1.title: Publica una solicitud
1.body: El builder asistido por IA define habilidades, condiciones, entorno de evaluación y presupuesto.

2.title: Recibe candidaturas
2.body: Los formadores verificados postulan. El motor de matching los ordena por encaje.

3.title: Lanza la evaluación
3.body: Prueba de cribado, tarea sobre tu modelo o flujo multi-etapa — puntuación auto + manual.

4.title: Elige un finalista
4.body: Compara intentos, conversa con finalistas y muévelos a aceptación con un clic.

5.title: Firma y paga vía escrow
5.body: Genera el contrato (NDA / MSA / SOW), firma digital y financia el escrow.

6.title: Evalúa y repite
6.body: Libera escrow por hito, intercambia reseñas verificadas y vuelve a contratar a tus mejores formadores.

steps.title: El flujo completo, paso a paso

hero.title: Contrata y evalúa formadores IA de élite
hero.body: Olvídate de los CVs: evalúa en tu modelo real — fine-tuning, RLHF, evaluación, seguridad, prompt engineering.

requestBuilder.title: Builder de solicitudes IA
requestBuilder.body: Genera solicitudes estructuradas desde un brief con habilidades y criterios.

evaluation.title: Evaluación en modelo live
evaluation.body: Conecta API, sandbox o dataset y puntúa sobre el problema real.

matching.title: Shortlist inteligente
matching.body: El matching IA ordena a los mejores por encaje, tiempo de respuesta y reseñas.

chat.title: Espacio de negociación
chat.body: Chat cifrado, archivos, escaneo de adjuntos y resúmenes IA.

contracts.title: Escrow + firma digital

global.body: Trabaja desde cualquier lugar: precios, impuestos y contratos localizados.

4.body: Entrega hitos, libera escrow y consigue reseñas verificadas.

earnings.title: Ingresos reales, protecciones reales
earnings.body: Nuestro escrow retiene el dinero de la empresa antes de que empieces.

integrations.title: Integraciones
integrations.subtitle: Conecta Trainova con tus herramientas mediante webhooks.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Recibe POST HTTP para eventos de la plataforma.
webhooks.createHint: Firmamos cada payload con HMAC-SHA256. El secreto aparece una sola vez.
webhooks.eventsHint: Deja todo sin marcar para suscribirte a todos los eventos.
webhooks.secretRevealedHint: Cópialo ahora — no volverá a mostrarse.
